responsibilities: Gather and document business requirements from stakeholders to support new system and process initiatives
Analyze existing business processes to identify inefficiencies and recommend data-driven improvements
Translate business requirements into clear functional specifications for engineering and technical teams
Conduct cost-benefit and impact analyses to evaluate proposed process changes and technology investments
Facilitate workshops and meetings with stakeholders to align on project scope, priorities, and timelines
Create process maps and workflow diagrams that document current and future state business operations
Support user acceptance testing to ensure delivered solutions meet documented business requirements
Analyze operational data to identify trends and support evidence-based recommendations for leadership
Bridge communication between business stakeholders and technical teams throughout the project lifecycle
Monitor and report on project progress, risks, and dependencies to keep initiatives on track
